data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-b0257e9864bf4b859bdbc769cf4c2e6d && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}
